calendar.matters:
PETITION Petition By Agent Johnny Smith Under Power Of Attorney For Order To Establish A (D)(A) Special Needs Trust
Off Calendar Jun-01-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Caitlin Carey for (petitioner) Johnny Smith. Beneficiary Kevin McCann also present.

Ms. Carey stated that there are two issues remaining, the first is in regards to 7.903, that it does not apply to their petition as their petition was not brought under that code section, that there is a small amount going into the trust and that her client waives protections, that a declaration was submitted regarding the initial trustee, that the initial successor trustee is Kevin's sister and that they will submit a revised proposed order. The petition by agent Johnny Smith under power of attorney for order to establish a special needs trust was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)
